title: Minimum Value
text: Minimum Value Minimum value allowed for the spin button widget Description This value is not mapped to the widget property. Instead, it is combined with the Maximum value, and set in the ValRep list as a as Minimum : Maximum value. For example, you can change the minimum and maximum values of a spin button widget in Proc as follows: ; set the minimum and maximum values to -16 and +16: $valrep(NUMFLD)="-15:15" Copy The Increment Value determines the intervening points in the ValRep. Applies To uspinbutton (SpinButton) Related Links Maximum Value Maximum value allowed for the widget Increment Value Amount by which the value in the spin button is increased each time it is clicked. The default is 1. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
